title: The Shawshank Redemption
overview: Two imprisoned men bond over a number of years, finding solace and eventual redemption through acts of common decency.

title: The Dark Knight
overview: When the menace known as the Joker emerges, he causes chaos and tests Batman's resolve in Gotham City.

title: Inception
overview: A skilled thief is offered a chance to have his criminal history erased by implanting another person's idea into a target's subconscious.

title: The Matrix
overview: A computer hacker learns about the true nature of his reality and his role in a war against its controllers.

title: Titanic
overview: A young couple from different social classes fall in love aboard the ill-fated RMS Titanic.

title: Interstellar
overview: A team of explorers travel through a wormhole in space in an attempt to ensure humanity's survival.

title: The Godfather
overview: The aging patriarch of an organized crime dynasty transfers control of his clandestine empire to his reluctant son.

title: Pulp Fiction
overview: The lives of two mob hitmen, a boxer, and a pair of diner bandits intertwine in four tales of violence and redemption.

title: Forrest Gump
overview: The presidencies of Kennedy and Johnson, the Vietnam War, and other history unfold through the perspective of an Alabama man.

title: The Lion King
overview: A young lion prince flees his kingdom only to learn the true meaning of responsibility and bravery.

title: Fight Club
overview: An insomniac office worker and a soap maker form an underground fight club that evolves into something much more.

title: The Avengers
overview: Earth's mightiest heroes must come together to stop a mischievous god bent on chaos and destruction.

title: La La Land
overview: A jazz pianist and an aspiring actress fall in love while pursuing their dreams in Los Angeles.

title: Parasite
overview: A poor family schemes to become employed by a wealthy family and infiltrates their household one member at a time.

title: The Silence of the Lambs
overview: A young FBI cadet seeks the help of a brilliant cannibal to catch another serial killer.

title: Guardians of the Galaxy
overview: A group of intergalactic criminals must pull together to stop a fanatical warrior with plans to purge the universe.

title: The Grand Budapest Hotel
overview: A concierge teams with a lobby boy to prove his innocence after being framed for murder during the 1930s.

title: Moonlight
overview: A young man grapples with his identity and sexuality while growing up in a rough neighborhood of Miami.

title: Mad Max: Fury Road
overview: In a post-apocalyptic wasteland, a drifter helps a rebel to flee a tyrant who controls the land's water supply.

title: Spotlight
overview: The true story of how a team of journalists uncovered a widespread child abuse scandal within the Catholic Church.
